meaning: long table; counter; (coll.) case (criminal, medical etc); matter; pro
sentence: 侦探接手了一个复杂的案子。
pinyin: Zhēn tàn jiē shǒu le yī gè fù zá de àn zi.
english: The detective took on a complicated case.

meaning: to line up; to stand in line; (fig.) to take sides; to side with sb; t
sentence: 同事之间闹矛盾，他不想站队。
pinyin: Tóng shì zhī jiān nào máo dùn, tā bù xiǎng zhàn duì.
english: His colleagues had a conflict, and he didn't want to take sides.

sentence: 印刷厂今天开始制版，明天就能出货。
pinyin: Yìn shuā chǎng jīn tiān kāi shǐ zhì bǎn, míng tiān jiù néng chū huò.
english: The print shop starts making plates today and can ship tomorrow.

meaning: fifth of the five night watch periods 03:00-05:00 (old)
sentence: 古时候人们在五更时分就要起床了。
pinyin: Gǔ shí hòu rén men zài wǔ gēng shí fēn jiù yào qǐ chuáng le.
english: In ancient times, people had to get up at the fifth watch (around 3–5 a.m.).

sentence: 医生叮嘱他避免不安全的性行为。
pinyin: Yīshēng dīngzhǔ tā bìmiǎn bù ānquán de xìngxíngwéi.
english: The doctor advised him to avoid unsafe sexual activity.
